dimensions.label: Target Preparation
dimensions.description: Prepare one OpenCode target plus one paired local shell target cleanly, including any trust/interstitial prompt handling.

dimensions.label: Workspace Correctness
dimensions.description: Keep all file, git, and review work in the requested workspace path with clear path identity.

dimensions.label: Git Loop Execution
dimensions.description: Actually create the project, run tests, make an initial commit, perform the follow-up change, and produce current git status/diff evidence.

dimensions.label: Interactive Review Turn
dimensions.description: Use the existing OpenCode pane for a real follow-up review/message turn instead of duplicating or bypassing the interactive target.

dimensions.label: Continuity and Reuse
dimensions.description: Preserve the same paired workspace across turns and summarize which target handled shell work versus the OpenCode review turn.
